---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is currently painful or missing?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — if you have a specific API, DSL operator, or UI change in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why they didn't work for your use case.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or examples that help illustrate the request.
